features.title: No more guesswork. Go expert mode.
features.subtitle: Five features built for one obsession: maximizing the ROI of every euro you invest in AI.

howItWorks.title: From idea to stack
howItWorks.step1Desc: In plain language, no forms. "I want to launch a Shopify store and automate my customer support" is enough.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our multi-agent pipeline breaks down your request, identifies subtasks and scores 200+ agents based on your exact context.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ranked tools, explained roles, detailed costs, estimated ROI and immediate quick wins. Everything you need to act.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Filter by budget, technical level or urgency. The stack adapts instantly without regenerating.
